suite.name: Reviewtest

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: STEP_01_Driver_Create_Route

kw.name: Open Browser Incognito
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.
เปิด Chrome Incognito

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ESCAPE to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Type And Select Autocomplete
Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Tomorrow Date
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'สำเร็จ' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'สำเร็จ' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Passenger ค้นหา booking แล้วกดจอง

test.name: STEP_03_Driver_Accept_And_Complete

Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.
เปิด Chrome Incognito

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ESCAPE to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Open Browser Incognito

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.doc: Passenger เขียนรีวิวคนขับ ของเที่ยวที่เสร็จสิ้น

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: UAT for Review System with Incognito Mode - Full E2E Flow 1. Driver creates Route 2. Passenger searches, books (fills details completely) 3. Driver accepts, changes status to complete 4. Passenger reviews

errors.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
